info.description: Client area API for web- and telegram-based applications
info.title: Amber REST API schema

get.description:
Checks if user is authenticated. 

Always returns `sessionKey` in the cookie AND JSON reply regardles of status of authentication. If `sessionKey` was not sent with this request, method creates it and sends the cookie in the response.

200.description: Result of check. Always returns `sessionKey` in the cookie and JSON reply regardless of status of authentication.

post.description:
Assigns `sessionKey` to the user by `phone` in the database if `code` or `serviceKey` is correct. Any subsequent requests to secured methods will check `sessionKey` and authenticate request.

Session key SHOULD be sent in the cookie with the request. If you don't have `sessionKey` at this point, check GET method.

This method also tries to link user with the Tallanto record by phone. No exceptions are thrown, status is stored to the user entity in the database.

parameters.name: sessionKey
parameters.description: Session key is a 40-character alphanumeric string. Should be provided in the cookie (see GET method).

404.description: User with this phone not found.

post.description:
Registers user account with the phone number provided in the request.

Assigns `sessionKey` to the user by `phone` in the database if `code` or `serviceKey` is correct. Any subsequent requests to secured methods will check `sessionKey` and authenticate request.

Session key SHOULD be sent in the cookie with the request. If you don't have `sessionKey` at this point, check GET method.

This method also tries to link user with the Tallanto record by phone. No exceptions are thrown, status is stored to the user entity in the database.

parameters.name: sessionKey
parameters.description: Session key is a 40-character alphanumeric string. Should be provided in the cookie (see GET method).

204.description:
User registered.
User is authenticated after this operation.

409.description: User with this phone already exists.

parameters.name: phone
parameters.description: Phone number to make a call to.

400.description:
Validation failed.  May be one of the following (or something else):
* Invalid phone

429.description:
Client sends too many requests, please calm down.

Requests are allowed every 60 seconds. So please wait 61 seconds to be sure you wouldn't get this response accidentally.

500.description:
Internal server or service error. May be one of the following (or something else):
* InsufficientFundsException
* IpAddressBlockedException
* DeliveryException
* SmsCenterException

All of them are bad and there is nothing you can do, just show something pleasant to the user.

502.description: Upstream server died. Apparently client should repeat the request.

get.description: Returns current user profile, including first and last names and other information known to server

parameters.name: sessionKey
parameters.description: Session key is a 40-character alphanumeric string

401.description: No credentials are provided, or the provided credentials are refused.

404.description:
User is not found.

This might happen if Tallanto contact is not linked with the user account. Check the POST method.

put.description:
Updates current user profile, including first and last name and other information.

Unable to update following properties using this method. Trying to change them will produce a HTTP 409 error:
  - tallantoContactId
  - tallantoStatus
  - phone

parameters.name: sessionKey
parameters.description: Session key is a 40-character alphanumeric string

401.description: No credentials are provided, or the provided credentials are refused.

409.description: Unable to change the phone, use special method for this operation

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description:
Filter messages by uread status: `read`, `unread`.
* `read` — stands for read messages;
* `unread` — stands for unread messages.
Examples: 
* filter=[unread] returns only unread messages.
* filter=[unread,read] returns unread AND read mesages.
* filter=[] returns no messages.

401.description: No credentials are provided, or the provided credentials are refused.

parameters.name: sessionKey
parameters.description: Session key is a 40-character alphanumeric string

parameters.name: messageId
parameters.description: Numeric ID of the message to get.

401.description: No credentials are provided, or the provided credentials are refused.

403.description: Access forbidden, message doesn't belong to this user

403.description: The credentials indicate a system-known user, but the user is not allowed to perform the requested operation.

parameters.name: sessionKey
parameters.description: Session key is a 40-character alphanumeric string

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description:
Filter subscriptions by group status: `active`, `inactive`.
* `active` — stands for 'Active', 'PastDue'
* `inactive` — stands for 'Cancelled', 'Rejected', 'Expired'.
Examples: 
* filter=[inactive] returns only inactive subscriptions.
* filter=[inactive,active] returns inactive AND active subscriptions.
* filter=[] returns no subscriptions.

401.description: No credentials are provided, or the provided credentials are refused.

parameters.name: sessionKey
parameters.description: Session key is a 40-character alphanumeric string

parameters.name: subscriptionId
parameters.description: ID of the subscription to get.

401.description: No credentials are provided, or the provided credentials are refused.

403.description: The credentials indicate a system-known user, but the user is not allowed to perform the requested operation.

parameters.name: sessionKey
parameters.description: Session key is a 40-character alphanumeric string

parameters.name: subscriptionId
parameters.description: ID of the subscription to get.

204.description:
The subscription to cancel.

We return HTTP 204 because cancellation is asynchronous -- we make a request to CloudPayments API and it makes webhook call with a Recurrent Notification. At this point we can't tell anything about subscription status.

401.description: No credentials are provided, or the provided credentials are refused.

403.description: The credentials indicate a system-known user, but the user is not allowed to perform the requested operation.

get.description:
Returns current user banking cards. User must check a checkbox when making a payment to save the card.

We do not store banking card numbers or CVV. Just partial information and special token that can be used for recurrent payments.

parameters.name: sessionKey
parameters.description: Session key is a 40-character alphanumeric string

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description:
Filter cards by card status: `active`, `inactive`.
* `active` — stands for active cards;
* `inactive` — stands for inactive (expired) cards.
Examples: 
* filter=[inactive] returns only inactive cards.
* filter=[inactive,active] returns inactive AND active cards.
* filter=[] returns no cards.

401.description: No credentials are provided, or the provided credentials are refused.

parameters.name: sessionKey
parameters.description: Session key is a 40-character alphanumeric string

parameters.name: cardId
parameters.description: ID of the card to get.

If `id` is null, it's a special banner that can't be hide. For example, "Confirm your email".

Account.description:
Either `code` or `serviceKey` SHOULD be provided in the request.           `code` is entered by the user in a web form (see **/account/code**). 

`serviceKey` is used to authenticate requests from _our_ services and is configured in the requestor's settings.

status.description: The original response code of the response

type.description: An error type for classification of the error

message.description: A message describing the problem in relation to the error type in human-readable form

moreInfo.description: A link to get more information on that kind of error type

field.description: A bean notation expression specifying the element in the request data causing the error, such as "code". This can be empty if the violation is not field-specific.

type.description: An error type for classification of the detailed error. The type must be a sub-type of the type specified in the common error payload.

message.description: A message that describes the problem that is more specific to the sub-type.

moreInfo.description: A link to information related to the sub-error type.

code.description: Code entered by the user in the login form

serviceKey.description: Private token which is known to Amber to authenticate requesting service itself

tallantoStatus.description: Tallanto linking status. Can be: "linked", "not_found" or "multiple"

body.example: Long HTML-enabled text with detailed description

status.description:
Status of the subscription:
- *Active* -- immidiately after creation and after each successful payment.
- *PastDue* -- after one or two consecutive failed payments.
- *Cancelled* -- after subscription cancelled by request.
- *Rejected* -- after three consecutive failed payments.
- *Expired* -- after all periods were paid, if applicable.

startDate.description: Date and time of the first payment

maxPeriods.description: Total number of payment periods. Period equals 1 month.

publicNumber.description: Unique subscription number to show to the user

isDefault.description: Is this card selected as default by the user?

handle.description: Symbolic handle of this product. Useful for 'hard-coding' in the templates — IDs may change, but the handle will always return correct product.
Unique literal handler for this dicount

inapplicableText.example: Скидки за непрерывное продление нет. Нужен действующий абонемент.

kind.description: Relative or absolute discount. Relative is a percent of price, absolute -- fixed amount.

productType.description: Type of product: yoga group, seminar, etc.

amount.description: Value of the discount. If kind is "relative" then "5" stands for 5%.

saveCard.description: Save card token for future payments or not

invoiceId.description: Unique invoice ID of this order

status.description: Status of the order: new, paid, cancelled or error

statusDescription.description: Description of the error or additional information about the status

planId.description: ID of the plan used to created this order

status.description:
Payment status. Can be:
* `AwaitingAuthentication` -- «Ожидает аутентификации»
* `Authorized` -- «Авторизована»
* `Completed` -- «Завершена»
* `Cancelled` -- «Отменена»
* `Declined` -- «Отклонена»

See https://cloudpayments.ru/Docs/Directory#statuses for details.
